title: Hammerheads
body:
![Shark gif :3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f8600e6c94774e40a6e4d82af9cb07933e923590.gif)

Replaces the Dolphin with the best flavor of shark :3 Fully animated!
![Blockbench screenshot of the shark's model](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4443ad6ffc6a3d46f5580fec4ddd44d9b3dbc131.png)
Recommended for use with [WaterBobbu](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/waterbobbu)
